title: QA Analyst
description: Join Akamai's QA team to ensure our products deliver world-class performance and reliability to millions of users.
responsibilities: Develop and execute test plans for complex software systems
Identify and document bugs and performance issues with detailed reproductions
Collaborate with engineers on testing strategies and automation
Monitor production performance and user-reported issues
Create test automation scripts and frameworks
Participate in architectural reviews and performance testing

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; relevant degree or certification strongly preferred

benefits: Competitive salary with annual equity grants
Flexible time off and work arrangements
